mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO cat_mesh_concept_relation ( id, descriptor_id, concept_ui, is_preferred, relation_name, concept1_ui, concept2_ui, version, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.descriptorId}, #{item.conceptUi}, #{item.isPreferred}, #{item.relationName}, #{item.concept1Ui}, #{item.concept2Ui}, 0, NOW(6), NOW(6), 0 )
